items.question: Напиши запрос который выведет исходящий остаток по счету 42111978300000577972 на дату 24.05.2026.
items.answer:
SELECT
  a.account_nbr AS "номер_счёта",
  f.report_date AS "дата_отчёта",
  vf.name AS "валюта",
  f.balance_out AS "исходящий_остаток",
  f.balance_rur_out AS "исходящий_остаток_руб"
FROM v_d_account a
INNER JOIN v_f_account_rest f
  ON a.account_id = f.account_id
LEFT JOIN vfund vf
  ON f.currency_id = vf.id
WHERE a.account_nbr = '42111978300000577972'
  AND f.report_date = '2026-05-24'

items.question: Постройте распределение количества вновь зарегистрированных в системе организаций по годам, но только для тех, чья отрасль содержит слово строительство.
items.answer:
SELECT EXTRACT(YEAR
FROM "v_d_entity_org"."reg_date")::integer AS registration_year, COUNT(DISTINCT "v_d_entity_org"."entity_core_id") AS new_organizations_count
FROM "v_d_entity_org"
LEFT JOIN "v_d_entity_org_okved"
  ON "v_d_entity_org"."entity_core_id" = "v_d_entity_org_okved"."entity_id"
WHERE "v_d_entity_org"."reg_date" IS NOT NULL
  AND LOWER("v_d_entity_org_okved"."okved") LIKE '%строительство%'
GROUP BY EXTRACT(YEAR
FROM "v_d_entity_org"."reg_date")
ORDER BY registration_year

items.question: Суммируй исходящий остаток в каждой валюте на дату '2026-05-24'.
items.answer:
SELECT
  vfund.code AS currency_code,
  vfund.name AS currency_name,
  SUM(v_f_account_rest.balance_out) AS total_balance_out,
  SUM(v_f_account_rest.balance_rur_out) AS total_balance_rur_out
FROM v_f_account_rest
LEFT JOIN vfund
  ON v_f_account_rest.currency_id = vfund.id
WHERE v_f_account_rest.report_date = '2026-05-24'
GROUP BY vfund.code, vfund.name
ORDER BY total_balance_out DESC

items.question: Вывести сумму рублевого остатка на счете по маскам счетов 40817, 40702 и 40821 на дату '2026-05-24' для каждой маски.
items.answer:
SELECT CASE
  WHEN "account_nbr" LIKE '40817%' THEN '40817'
  WHEN "account_nbr" LIKE '40702%' THEN '40702'
  WHEN "account_nbr" LIKE '40821%' THEN '40821' END AS account_mask, SUM("balance_rur_out") AS total_balance_rur
FROM "v_f_account_rest"
WHERE "report_date" = '2026-05-24'
  AND "balance_rur_out" IS NOT NULL
  AND ("account_nbr" LIKE '40817%'
  OR "account_nbr" LIKE '40702%'
  OR "account_nbr" LIKE '40821%')
GROUP BY CASE
  WHEN "account_nbr" LIKE '40817%' THEN '40817'
  WHEN "account_nbr" LIKE '40702%' THEN '40702'
  WHEN "account_nbr" LIKE '40821%' THEN '40821' END

items.question: Выведи топ 3 наименования счета у которого был максимальный оборот по кредиту в рублях на дату '2026-05-24'.
items.answer:
SELECT
  COALESCE(d."account_nm", r."account_nm") AS account_name,
  r."cr_turn" AS credit_turnover,
  r."cr_turn_eqv" AS credit_turnover_eqv,
  r."balance_rur_out" AS balance_rur_out
FROM "v_f_account_rest" r
INNER JOIN "vfund" f
  ON r."currency_id" = f."id"
LEFT JOIN "v_d_account" d
  ON r."account_id" = d."account_id"
WHERE r."report_date" = '2026-05-24'
  AND (r."crcy_iso_alpha_cd" = 'RUB'
  OR f."code" = '810'
  OR f."isocode" = 'RUB')
  AND r."cr_turn" IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY r."cr_turn" DESC
LIMIT 3

items.question: Предоставить запрос по договорам брокерского обслуживания на дату 2025-06-01.
items.answer:
SELECT
  b.agreement_id,
  b.beans_abs_id,
  b.agreement_nbr,
  b.location,
  b.open_dt,
  b.plan_close_dt,
  b.fact_close_dt,
  c.entity_core_id,
  COALESCE(c.entity_mdm_id, o.entity_crm_id) AS client_ref_id,
  c.entity_esk_id AS client_esk_id,
  CASE
  WHEN p.entity_type = 1 THEN 'ORG'
  WHEN p.entity_type = 2 THEN 'PSN'
  ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END AS client_type, COALESCE(o.short_name, o.full_name) AS client_name
FROM v_d_broker_agmt b
LEFT JOIN v_f_broker_agmt_client c
  ON b.agreement_id = c.agreement_id
  AND b.report_date = c.report_date
  AND c.begin_date <= '2025-06-01'
  AND (c.end_date IS NULL
  OR c.end_date >= '2025-06-01')
LEFT JOIN v_d_entity_psn p
  ON c.entity_core_id = p.entity_core_id
LEFT JOIN v_d_entity_org o
  ON c.entity_core_id = o.entity_core_id
WHERE b.report_date = '2025-06-01'
  AND b.open_dt <= '2025-06-01'
  AND (b.fact_close_dt IS NULL
  OR b.fact_close_dt >= '2025-06-01')

items.question: Найти топ-5 локаций по количеству брокерских договоров за 2025 год. Вывести локацию, количество брокерских договоров, самую раннюю и самую позднюю дату открытия договора среди них.
items.answer:
SELECT
  "location",
  COUNT(DISTINCT agreement_id) AS cnt,
  MIN(open_dt) AS min_open_dt,
  MAX(open_dt) AS max_open_dt
FROM v_d_broker_agmt
WHERE report_date >= '2025-01-01'
  AND report_date <= '2025-12-31'
  AND open_dt >= '2025-01-01'
  AND open_dt <= '2025-12-31'
  AND "location" IS NOT NULL
  AND "location" <> ''
GROUP BY "location"
ORDER BY cnt DESC
LIMIT 5

items.question: Проанализируйте портфель кредитных договоров по группам риска РВП за 2025-11-01. Для каждой группы риска выведите код группы риска, количество активных договоров, общую сумму начисленных процентов, среднюю сумму процентов на договор и максимальную дату открытия договора в группе.
items.answer:
SELECT
  vclassifier.brief AS risk_group_code,
  COUNT(DISTINCT v_f_contract.agreement_id) AS active_contracts_count,
  SUM(v_f_agmt_schedule.sched_pay_amt) FILTER (WHERE v_f_agmt_schedule.sched_type_cd IN ('INTEREST', 'PERCENT')) AS total_interest_amount,
  (SUM(v_f_agmt_schedule.sched_pay_amt) FILTER (WHERE v_f_agmt_schedule.sched_type_cd IN ('INTEREST', 'PERCENT')) / COUNT(DISTINCT v_f_contract.agreement_id)::numeric) AS avg_interest_per_contract,
  MAX(v_f_contract.start_date) AS max_open_date
FROM v_f_contract
JOIN v_f_contract_account
  ON v_f_contract.report_date = v_f_contract_account.report_date
  AND v_f_contract.instrument_id = v_f_contract_account.instrument_id
  AND v_f_contract.agreement_id = v_f_contract_account.agreement_id
JOIN v_d_account
  ON v_f_contract_account.account_core_id = v_d_account.account_id
JOIN vaccount
  ON v_d_account.account_id = vaccount.id
JOIN vaccclassifier
  ON vaccount.id = vaccclassifier.accountid
  AND vaccclassifier.startdate <= '2025-11-01'
  AND (vaccclassifier.enddate IS NULL
  OR vaccclassifier.enddate >= '2025-11-01')
JOIN vclassifier
  ON vaccclassifier.classifierid = vclassifier.id
  AND vclassifier.objectid = 2
LEFT JOIN v_f_agmt_schedule
  ON v_f_contract.report_date = v_f_agmt_schedule.report_date
  AND v_f_contract.instrument_id = v_f_agmt_schedule.instrument_id
  AND v_f_contract.agreement_id = v_f_agmt_schedule.agreement_id
  AND v_f_agmt_schedule.sched_type_cd IN ('INTEREST', 'PERCENT')
WHERE v_f_contract.report_date = '2025-11-01'
  AND (v_f_contract.fact_final_date IS NULL
  OR v_f_contract.fact_final_date > '2025-11-01')
  AND v_f_contract_account.report_date = '2025-11-01'
GROUP BY vclassifier.brief
ORDER BY vclassifier.brief

items.question: Какой средний показатель оборота по дебету в валюте счета по рублевым счетам на дату '2026-05-24'?
items.answer:
SELECT AVG("v_f_account_rest"."db_turn") AS avg_db_turn
FROM "v_f_account_rest"
INNER JOIN "v_d_account"
  ON "v_f_account_rest"."account_id" = "v_d_account"."account_id"
INNER JOIN "vfund"
  ON "v_f_account_rest"."currency_id" = "vfund"."id"
WHERE "v_f_account_rest"."report_date" = '2026-05-24'
  AND ("vfund"."code" IN ('RUB', '810', '643')
  OR "vfund"."isocode" IN ('RUB', '810', '643')
  OR "vfund"."iso_name" ILIKE '%RUB%')

items.question: Покажи 100 клиентов которые были зарегистрированы в последние 3 месяца. Выведи идентификатор CORE, наименование организации, ИНН.
items.answer:
SELECT
  "entity_core_id",
  "full_name",
  "tin"
FROM "v_d_entity_org"
WHERE "reg_date" >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) - INTERVAL '3 months'
  AND "reg_date" IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY "reg_date" DESC
LIMIT 100

items.question: Какие отрасли наиболее представлены среди клиентов, топ-10?
items.answer:
SELECT
  COALESCE(v_d_entity_org_okved.okved, v_d_entity_org.okved, 'Не указано') AS okved_code,
  COUNT(DISTINCT rko_contracts.org_entity_id) AS cnt_clients,
  COUNT(DISTINCT rko_contracts.agreement_id) AS cnt_contracts
FROM rko_contracts
INNER JOIN v_d_entity_org
  ON rko_contracts.org_entity_id = v_d_entity_org.entity_core_id
LEFT JOIN v_d_entity_org_okved
  ON v_d_entity_org.entity_core_id = v_d_entity_org_okved.entity_id
  AND (v_d_entity_org_okved.final_date IS NULL
  OR v_d_entity_org_okved.final_date >= CURRENT_DATE)
WHERE rko_contracts.report_date = (SELECT MAX(report_date)
FROM rko_contracts)
  AND rko_contracts.close_date IS NULL
GROUP BY COALESCE(v_d_entity_org_okved.okved, v_d_entity_org.okved, 'Не указано')
HAVING COALESCE(v_d_entity_org_okved.okved, v_d_entity_org.okved, 'Не указано') <> 'Не указано'
ORDER BY cnt_clients DESC
LIMIT 10

items.question: За дату '2025-11-01' выведи топ-5 договоров РКО с максимальным количеством связанных счетов. Покажите идентификатор договора, номер договора, дату открытия, тип договора и количество счетов.
items.answer:
SELECT
  rc."agreement_id",
  rc."agreement_nbr",
  rc."open_date",
  rc."dog_type",
  COUNT(DISTINCT rca."account_id") AS accounts_count
FROM "rko_contracts" rc
INNER JOIN "rko_contracts_accounts" rca
  ON rc."agreement_id" = rca."agreement_id"
  AND rc."report_date" = rca."report_date"
WHERE rc."report_date" = DATE '2025-11-01'
  AND rca."date_from" <= DATE '2025-11-01'
  AND (rca."date_to" IS NULL
  OR rca."date_to" >= DATE '2025-11-01')
GROUP BY rc."agreement_id", rc."agreement_nbr", rc."open_date", rc."dog_type"
ORDER BY accounts_count DESC
LIMIT 5

items.question: За дату '2025-11-01' выведите уникальное количество счетов в договорах РКО для каждого филиала, сгруппированную по типу продукта. Покажите код филиала, регион, наименование продукта, тип договора и уникальное количество счетов. Ограничьте вывод 5 первыми записями.
items.answer:
SELECT
  rko_contracts.branch_code,
  rko_contracts.brnch_region_cd,
  rko_contracts.product_nm,
  rko_contracts.dog_type,
  COUNT(DISTINCT rko_contracts_accounts.account_id) AS unique_accounts_count
FROM rko_contracts
INNER JOIN rko_contracts_accounts
  ON rko_contracts.agreement_id = rko_contracts_accounts.agreement_id
  AND rko_contracts_accounts.report_date = rko_contracts.report_date
INNER JOIN v_d_account
  ON rko_contracts_accounts.account_id = v_d_account.account_id
WHERE rko_contracts.report_date = DATE '2025-11-01'
  AND rko_contracts_accounts.report_date = DATE '2025-11-01'
  AND rko_contracts_accounts.date_from <= DATE '2025-11-01'
  AND (rko_contracts_accounts.date_to >= DATE '2025-11-01'
  OR rko_contracts_accounts.date_to IS NULL)
GROUP BY rko_contracts.branch_code, rko_contracts.brnch_region_cd, rko_contracts.product_nm, rko_contracts.dog_type
ORDER BY unique_accounts_count DESC
LIMIT 5

items.question: За дату '2025-11-01' проанализируйте роли счетов в договорах РКО. Выведите 5 самых распространенных ролей счетов, указав код роли, ее наименование, тип договора, продукт и количество договоров, использующих эту роль.
items.answer:
SELECT
  "v_account_role"."short_name" AS account_role_code,
  "v_account_role"."long_name" AS account_role_name,
  "rko_contracts"."dog_type",
  COALESCE("rko_contracts"."product_nm", "rko_contracts"."product_cd") AS product,
  COUNT(DISTINCT "rko_contracts"."agreement_id") AS contracts_count
FROM "rko_contracts"
INNER JOIN "rko_contracts_accounts"
  ON "rko_contracts"."agreement_id" = "rko_contracts_accounts"."agreement_id"
INNER JOIN "v_account_role"
  ON "rko_contracts_accounts"."account_role_id" = "v_account_role"."account_role_id"
WHERE "rko_contracts"."report_date" = '2025-11-01'
  AND "rko_contracts_accounts"."date_from" <= '2025-11-01'
  AND ("rko_contracts_accounts"."date_to" >= '2025-11-01'
  OR "rko_contracts_accounts"."date_to" IS NULL)
GROUP BY "v_account_role"."short_name", "v_account_role"."long_name", "rko_contracts"."dog_type", COALESCE("rko_contracts"."product_nm", "rko_contracts"."product_cd")
ORDER BY contracts_count DESC, "v_account_role"."short_name", "rko_contracts"."dog_type", COALESCE("rko_contracts"."product_nm", "rko_contracts"."product_cd")
LIMIT 5

items.question: Вывести топ-5 валют по количеству открытых счетов за 2023 год. Для каждой валюты показать ее код, название, числовой ISO код и количество счетов. Отсортировать по убыванию количества счетов.
items.answer:
SELECT
  vfund.code AS currency_code,
  vfund.name AS currency_name,
  vfund.isocode AS currency_iso_numeric,
  COUNT(DISTINCT v_d_account.account_id) AS accounts_count
FROM v_d_account
INNER JOIN vfund
  ON v_d_account.currency_id = vfund.id
WHERE v_d_account.open_dt BETWEEN '2023-01-01'
  AND '2023-12-31'
  AND (v_d_account.close_dt IS NULL
  OR v_d_account.close_dt > '2023-12-31')
  AND v_d_account.technical_ind != '1'
GROUP BY vfund.code, vfund.name, vfund.isocode
ORDER BY accounts_count DESC
LIMIT 5

items.question: Для 5 самых популярных балансовых счетов 2-го порядка по количеству закрытых лицевых счетов до 2026-01-01 вывести номер, название, наименование счета первого порядка, общее количество лицевых счетов и средний срок между открытием и закрытием.
items.answer:
SELECT
  a."bal_acct_2lvl_nbr" AS "bal_acct_2lvl_nbr",
  s."name" AS "bal_acct_name",
  s."name_0" AS "bal_acct_1lvl_name",
  COUNT(*) AS "total_accounts",
  ROUND(AVG(a."close_dt" - a."open_dt")::numeric, 2) AS "avg_term_days"
FROM "v_d_account" a
INNER JOIN "vsinaccount" s
  ON a."balance_account_id" = s."id"
WHERE a."close_dt" IS NOT NULL
  AND a."close_dt" < '2026-01-01'
  AND a."bal_acct_2lvl_nbr" IS NOT NULL
  AND s."sintype" = 'A'
GROUP BY a."bal_acct_2lvl_nbr", s."name", s."name_0"
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 5

items.question: Найти 5 счетов с наибольшим суммарным оборотом, сумма всех операций по дебету плюс по кредиту в рублевом эквиваленте, за 2025 год. Для каждого счета вывести номер, наименование, код валюты счета, общий оборот, количество операций и дату открытия счета.
items.answer:
SELECT
  "v_f_account_rest"."account_nbr" AS account_nbr,
  "v_d_account"."account_nm" AS account_nm,
  COALESCE("vfund"."isocode", "vfund"."code") AS currency_code,
  SUM("v_f_account_rest"."db_turn_eqv" + "v_f_account_rest"."cr_turn_eqv")::numeric AS total_turnover_rur,
  COUNT(*) AS operation_count,
  "v_d_account"."open_dt" AS open_dt
FROM "v_f_account_rest"
INNER JOIN "v_d_account"
  ON "v_f_account_rest"."account_id" = "v_d_account"."account_id"
LEFT JOIN "vfund"
  ON "v_f_account_rest"."currency_id" = "vfund"."id"
WHERE "v_f_account_rest"."report_date" BETWEEN '2025-01-01'
  AND '2025-12-31'
GROUP BY "v_f_account_rest"."account_id", "v_f_account_rest"."account_nbr", "v_d_account"."account_nm", COALESCE("vfund"."isocode", "vfund"."code"), "v_d_account"."open_dt"
ORDER BY total_turnover_rur DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 5

items.question: На отчетную дату 2025-06-30 выведите топ-5 филиалов по количеству активных брокерских договоров, закрепленных за допофисами: код филиала, наименование филиала, количество уникальных договоров, количество уникальных допофисов и среднее количество договоров на один допофис.
items.answer:
SELECT
  vbranch.code AS branch_code,
  vbranch.name AS branch_name,
  COUNT(DISTINCT v_d_broker_agmt.agreement_id) AS agreement_count,
  COUNT(DISTINCT v_f_broker_agmt_otc_asn.dep_core_id) AS department_count,
  COUNT(DISTINCT v_d_broker_agmt.agreement_id)::numeric / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT v_f_broker_agmt_otc_asn.dep_core_id), 0)::numeric AS avg_agreements_per_dept
FROM v_d_broker_agmt
LEFT JOIN v_f_broker_agmt_otc_asn
  ON v_d_broker_agmt.agreement_id = v_f_broker_agmt_otc_asn.agreement_id
  AND v_f_broker_agmt_otc_asn.report_date = v_d_broker_agmt.report_date
  AND v_f_broker_agmt_otc_asn.begin_date <= '2025-06-30'
  AND (v_f_broker_agmt_otc_asn.end_date IS NULL
  OR v_f_broker_agmt_otc_asn.end_date >= '2025-06-30')
LEFT JOIN v_department_pc_fed
  ON v_f_broker_agmt_otc_asn.dep_core_id = v_department_pc_fed.department_core_id
LEFT JOIN vbranch
  ON v_department_pc_fed.branch_code = vbranch.code
WHERE v_d_broker_agmt.report_date = '2025-06-30'
  AND v_d_broker_agmt.open_dt <= '2025-06-30'
  AND (v_d_broker_agmt.fact_close_dt IS NULL
  OR v_d_broker_agmt.fact_close_dt > '2025-06-30')
  AND v_f_broker_agmt_otc_asn.dep_core_id IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY vbranch.code, vbranch.name
ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT v_d_broker_agmt.agreement_id) DESC
LIMIT 5

items.question: Выведите топ-5 брокерских договоров с максимальным периодом действия одного тарифа в днях за 2025-11-01. Для каждого договора покажите номер договора, тариф, дату начала и окончания, длительность периода.
items.answer:
SELECT
  a."agreement_nbr",
  t."tariff",
  t."begin_date",
  t."end_date",
  (t."end_date" - t."begin_date" + 1) AS tariff_duration_days
FROM "v_d_broker_agmt" a
INNER JOIN "v_f_broker_agmt_tariff_asn" t
  ON a."agreement_id" = t."agreement_id"
WHERE a."report_date" = '2025-11-01'
  AND t."report_date" = '2025-11-01'
  AND t."begin_date" IS NOT NULL
  AND t."end_date" IS NOT NULL
  AND t."begin_date" <= '2025-11-01'
  AND (t."end_date" >= '2025-11-01'
  OR t."end_date" IS NULL)
ORDER BY tariff_duration_days DESC
LIMIT 5

items.question: Проанализируйте динамику ставок для кредитных договоров, у которых в течение последних 30 дней до 2025-11-01 изменилась базовая ставка. Для каждой группы риска выведите название группы риска, количество договоров, среднюю предыдущую маржу, среднюю текущую маржу и среднюю разницу ставок.
items.answer:
SELECT
  COALESCE(v_f_entity_status.status_cd, 'Неизвестно') AS "группа_риска",
  COUNT(DISTINCT v_f_contract.agreement_id) AS "количество_договоров",
  AVG(v_f_contract_rate_ref.previos_margin) AS "средняя_предыдущая_маржа",
  AVG(v_f_contract_rate_ref.margin) AS "средняя_текущая_маржа",
  AVG(v_f_contract_rate_ref.percent_rate - v_f_contract_rate_ref.previos_percent_rate) AS "средняя_разница_ставок"
FROM v_f_contract
INNER JOIN v_f_contract_rate_ref
  ON v_f_contract.instrument_id = v_f_contract_rate_ref.instrument_id
  AND v_f_contract.agreement_id = v_f_contract_rate_ref.agreement_id
  AND v_f_contract.report_date = v_f_contract_rate_ref.report_date

items.question: Для каждого филиала на 2025-11-01 определите распределение остатков по типам счетов по кредитным договорам. Выведите код филиала, тип остатка счета, количество уникальных договоров, общую сумму остатков и средний остаток на один договор.

SELECT
  vbranch.code AS branch_code,
  v_f_contract_od.account_balance_type_cd AS balance_type,
  COUNT(DISTINCT v_f_contract_od.agreement_id) AS unique_contracts_count,
  SUM(v_f_contract_od.agreement_account_rest) AS total_rest_amount,
  AVG(v_f_contract_od.agreement_account_rest)::numeric(32, 8) AS avg_rest_per_contract
FROM v_f_contract_od
INNER JOIN v_d_account
  ON v_f_contract_od.account_core_id = v_d_account.account_id
INNER JOIN v_f_contract
  ON v_f_contract_od.instrument_id = v_f_contract.instrument_id
  AND v_f_contract_od.agreement_id = v_f_contract.agreement_id
  AND v_f_contract_od.report_date = v_f_contract.report_date

items.question: Есть ли дубликаты по ИНН среди клиентов, где он не пустой и заполнен значением. Выведи топ 10 ИНН и количество дублей.
items.answer:

  TRIM(tin) AS tin_value,
  COUNT(*) AS duplicate_count
FROM v_d_entity_psn
WHERE tin IS NOT NULL
  AND TRIM(tin) <> ''
  AND entity_type = 1
GROUP BY TRIM(tin)

ORDER BY duplicate_count DESC, tin_value

SELECT

  v_f_repo_deal.deal_security_nbr AS deal_number,

items.question: Выведите топ-5 филиалов по коду с наибольшим количеством открытых действующих счетов на дату '2025-11-01'. Для каждого филиала в разрезе допофиса покажите код филиала, название филиала, наименование допофиса, количество счетов, количество уникальных клиентов-владельцев и средний срок действия счетов в днях.
items.answer:
WITH active_accounts AS (SELECT a.account_id, a.owner_entity_id, a.open_dt, a.brnch_entity_id, a.dept_entity_id, b.code AS branch_code, b.name AS branch_name, d.department_name AS department_name
FROM "v_d_account" a
LEFT JOIN "vbranch" b
  ON a.brnch_entity_id = b.id
LEFT JOIN "v_department_pc_fed" d
  ON a.dept_entity_id = d.department_core_id
LEFT JOIN "v_d_entity_psn" p
  ON a.owner_entity_id = p.entity_core_id
WHERE a.open_dt <= '2025-11-01'
  AND (a.close_dt IS NULL
  OR a.close_dt > '2025-11-01')
  AND a.technical_ind = '0'
  AND (p.actual_id = 1
  OR p.actual_id IS NULL)), branch_stats AS (SELECT branch_code, branch_name, department_name, COUNT(DISTINCT account_id) AS account_count, COUNT(DISTINCT owner_entity_id) AS client_count, AVG(EXTRACT(DAY
FROM AGE('2025-11-01', open_dt)))::numeric AS avg_days
FROM active_accounts
GROUP BY branch_code, branch_name, department_name), top_branches AS (SELECT branch_code
FROM branch_stats
GROUP BY branch_code
ORDER BY SUM(account_count) DESC
LIMIT 5)
SELECT
  bs.branch_code,
  bs.branch_name,
  COALESCE(bs.department_name, 'Не указан') AS department_name,
  bs.account_count,
  bs.client_count,
  ROUND(bs.avg_days, 2) AS avg_days
FROM branch_stats bs
WHERE bs.branch_code IN (SELECT branch_code
FROM top_branches)
ORDER BY (SELECT SUM(account_count)
FROM branch_stats bs2
WHERE bs2.branch_code = bs.branch_code) DESC, bs.branch_code, bs.account_count DESC

items.question: Для каждого филиала и типа платежа за дату 2025-11-01 вывести количество активных кредитных договоров, общую плановую сумму платежей, среднюю процентную ставку по графикам, максимальную дату окончания платежного периода. Показать только записи, где общая сумма платежей превышает 100000, отсортировать по ней по убыванию.
items.answer:
WITH active_contracts AS (SELECT fc.agreement_id, fc.agreement_nbr, fc.short_name
FROM v_f_contract fc
WHERE fc.report_date = '2025-11-01'
  AND (fc.fact_final_date IS NULL
  OR fc.fact_final_date > '2025-11-01')), contract_branches AS (SELECT DISTINCT ac.agreement_id, vb.name AS branch_name
FROM active_contracts ac
LEFT JOIN v_f_contract_account fca
  ON ac.agreement_id = fca.agreement_id
  AND fca.report_date = '2025-11-01'
LEFT JOIN v_d_account vda
  ON fca.account_core_id = vda.account_id
LEFT JOIN vbranch vb
  ON vda.brnch_entity_id = vb.id), payment_types AS (SELECT DISTINCT fap.agreement_id, fap.transaction_type_name
FROM v_f_agmt_payment fap
WHERE fap.report_date = '2025-11-01'), schedule_agg AS (SELECT fas.agreement_id, SUM(fas.sched_pay_amt) AS total_planned_payment_amount, AVG(fas.interest_rate) AS avg_interest_rate, MAX(fas.sched_final_dt) AS max_payment_period_end_date
FROM v_f_agmt_schedule fas
WHERE fas.report_date = '2025-11-01'
GROUP BY fas.agreement_id)
SELECT
  cb.branch_name,
  pt.transaction_type_name,
  COUNT(DISTINCT ac.agreement_id) AS active_contracts_count,
  sa.total_planned_payment_amount,
  sa.avg_interest_rate,
  sa.max_payment_period_end_date
FROM active_contracts ac
LEFT JOIN contract_branches cb
  ON ac.agreement_id = cb.agreement_id
LEFT JOIN payment_types pt
  ON ac.agreement_id = pt.agreement_id
LEFT JOIN schedule_agg sa
  ON ac.agreement_id = sa.agreement_id
WHERE sa.total_planned_payment_amount IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY cb.branch_name, pt.transaction_type_name, sa.total_planned_payment_amount, sa.avg_interest_rate, sa.max_payment_period_end_date
HAVING SUM(sa.total_planned_payment_amount) > 100000
ORDER BY sa.total_planned_payment_amount DESC

items.question: Найти клиентов по кредитным договорам, у которых за 2025-11-01 общий остаток по счетам превышает 1000000000. Вывести краткое наименование клиента, количество договоров, общую сумму остатков, общую сумму начисленных процентов и среднюю группу риска РВП.
items.answer:
SELECT
  v_d_entity_org.short_name AS client_name,
  COUNT(DISTINCT v_f_contract.agreement_id) AS contract_count,
  SUM(v_f_account_rest.balance_out) AS total_balance,
  SUM(v_f_account_rest.balance_out * v_f_contract_rate_ref.percent_rate / 100::numeric * EXTRACT(DAY
FROM AGE(COALESCE(v_f_contract.fact_final_date, v_f_contract.planned_final_date), v_f_contract.start_date)) / 365::numeric) AS total_interest, (SELECT v_f_entity_status.status_cd
FROM v_f_entity_status
WHERE v_f_entity_status.entity_id = v_d_entity_org.entity_core_id
  AND v_f_entity_status.start_date <= '2025-11-01'
  AND (v_f_entity_status.final_date IS NULL
  OR v_f_entity_status.final_date > '2025-11-01')
ORDER BY v_f_entity_status.start_date DESC
LIMIT 1) AS risk_group
FROM v_f_contract
INNER JOIN v_f_contract_account
  ON v_f_contract.report_date = v_f_contract_account.report_date
  AND v_f_contract.agreement_id = v_f_contract_account.agreement_id
  AND v_f_contract.instrument_id = v_f_contract_account.instrument_id
INNER JOIN v_f_account_rest
  ON v_f_contract_account.account_core_id = v_f_account_rest.account_id
  AND v_f_contract_account.report_date = v_f_account_rest.report_date
INNER JOIN v_d_entity_org
  ON v_f_contract_account.contractor_core_id = v_d_entity_org.entity_core_id
LEFT JOIN v_f_contract_rate_ref
  ON v_f_contract.report_date = v_f_contract_rate_ref.report_date
  AND v_f_contract.instrument_id = v_f_contract_rate_ref.instrument_id
  AND v_f_contract.agreement_id = v_f_contract_rate_ref.agreement_id
WHERE v_f_contract.report_date = '2025-11-01'
  AND v_f_account_rest.report_date = '2025-11-01'
  AND (v_f_contract.fact_final_date IS NULL
  OR v_f_contract.fact_final_date > '2025-11-01')
  AND v_f_contract_account.account_role_short_name = 'MAIN_DEBT'
GROUP BY v_d_entity_org.short_name, v_d_entity_org.entity_core_id
HAVING SUM(v_f_account_rest.balance_out) > 1000000000

items.question: Получить сводные остатки по валютам и банковским продуктам для всех активных сделок РЕПО на заданную дату. Вывести продукт, валюту, количество сделок и суммарный остаток.
items.answer:
SELECT
  v_f_repo_deal.product_cd AS product,
  vfund.code AS currency,
  COUNT(DISTINCT v_f_repo_deal.leg1_deal_security_id) AS deal_count,
  SUM(v_f_repo_acc_rest.balance_out) AS total_balance
FROM v_f_repo_deal
INNER JOIN v_f_repo_acc_asn
  ON v_f_repo_deal.leg1_deal_security_id = v_f_repo_acc_asn.leg1_deal_security_id
INNER JOIN v_f_repo_acc_rest
  ON v_f_repo_acc_asn.leg1_deal_security_id = v_f_repo_acc_rest.leg1_deal_security_id
  AND v_f_repo_acc_asn.account_id = v_f_repo_acc_rest.account_id
INNER JOIN v_d_account
  ON v_f_repo_acc_asn.account_id = v_d_account.account_id
LEFT JOIN vfund
  ON v_f_repo_acc_rest.currency_id = vfund.id
LEFT JOIN v_account_role
  ON v_f_repo_acc_asn.account_core_role_id = v_account_role.account_role_id
WHERE v_f_repo_deal.balance_date = '2024-01-01'
  AND v_f_repo_acc_rest.balance_date = '2024-01-01'
  AND v_f_repo_deal.leg1_exec_dt <= '2024-01-01'
  AND (v_f_repo_deal.leg2_exec_dt IS NULL
  OR v_f_repo_deal.leg2_exec_dt > '2024-01-01')
  AND v_f_repo_acc_asn.start_date <= '2024-01-01'
  AND (v_f_repo_acc_asn.final_date IS NULL
  OR v_f_repo_acc_asn.final_date >= '2024-01-01')

ORDER BY v_f_repo_deal.product_cd, vfund.code

items.question: Получить сводные остатки за последний месяц по типам РЕПО и ролям счетов. Вывести тип сделки, роль счета и суммарный остаток.
items.answer:
SELECT
  d."product_cd" AS deal_type,
  COALESCE(ar."long_name", ar."short_name", 'Роль ' || a."account_core_role_id"::text) AS account_role_name,
  SUM(r."balance_out") AS total_balance,
  COUNT(DISTINCT d."leg1_deal_security_id") AS deal_count,
  f."name" AS currency_name
FROM "v_f_repo_deal" d
INNER JOIN "v_f_repo_acc_asn" a
  ON d."leg1_deal_security_id" = a."leg1_deal_security_id"
  AND d."balance_date" = a."balance_date"
INNER JOIN "v_f_repo_acc_rest" r
  ON a."leg1_deal_security_id" = r."leg1_deal_security_id"
  AND a."account_id" = r."account_id"
  AND a."balance_date" = r."balance_date"
LEFT JOIN "v_account_role" ar
  ON a."account_core_role_id" = ar."account_role_id"
LEFT JOIN "vfund" f
  ON r."currency_id" = f."id"
WHERE d."balance_date" >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 month')
  AND d."balance_date" < DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE)
  AND (a."final_date" IS NULL
  OR a."final_date" >= a."balance_date")
  AND (r."final_date" IS NULL
  OR r."final_date" >= r."balance_date")
GROUP BY d."product_cd", COALESCE(ar."long_name", ar."short_name", 'Роль ' || a."account_core_role_id"::text), f."name"
ORDER BY d."product_cd", account_role_name

items.question: Вывести любые 5 записей за 2025-11-01 по связанным счетам с договорами брокерского обслуживания. Вывести номер счета, номер договора, краткое наименование типа связи лицевого счета и договора, код торговой площадки, дату начала и окончания применения счета с учетом роли.

items.question: Найдите все действующие кредитные договоры за 2025-11-01, у которых суммарный остаток по всем связанным ссудным счетам превышает средний остаток по таким счетам в портфеле. Выведите номер договора, краткое наименование клиента, группу риска РВП, количество счетов и суммарный остаток.
items.answer:
WITH contract_od_accounts AS (SELECT fc.report_date, fc.instrument_id, fc.agreement_id, fc.agreement_nbr, fc.short_name AS contract_short_name, fc.contractor_abs_id, fc.start_date, fc.planned_final_date, fc.fact_final_date, fco.account_core_id, fco.account_balance_type_cd, var.account_role_id, var.short_name AS role_short_name, var.long_name AS role_long_name, var.account_role_desc
FROM v_f_contract fc
INNER JOIN v_f_contract_od fco
  ON fc.report_date = fco.report_date
  AND fc.instrument_id = fco.instrument_id
  AND fc.agreement_id = fco.agreement_id
INNER JOIN v_account_role var
  ON fco.account_role_id = var.account_role_id
WHERE fc.report_date = '2025-11-01'
  AND fc.start_date <= '2025-11-01'
  AND (fc.fact_final_date IS NULL
  OR fc.fact_final_date > '2025-11-01')
  AND (fc.planned_final_date IS NULL
  OR fc.planned_final_date >= '2025-11-01')
  AND fco.report_date = '2025-11-01'
  AND (var.short_name = 'OD'
  OR var.long_name ILIKE '%overdraft%'
  OR var.long_name ILIKE '%од%'
  OR var.account_role_desc ILIKE '%ссудн%'
  OR fco.account_balance_type_cd = 'OD')), account_rests AS (SELECT far.account_id, far.balance_out, far.report_date
FROM v_f_account_rest far
WHERE far.report_date = '2025-11-01'), contract_sums AS (SELECT coa.agreement_id, coa.instrument_id, coa.agreement_nbr, coa.contract_short_name, coa.contractor_abs_id, COUNT(DISTINCT coa.account_core_id) AS accounts_count, COALESCE(SUM(ar.balance_out), 0::numeric) AS total_balance
FROM contract_od_accounts coa
LEFT JOIN account_rests ar
  ON coa.account_core_id = ar.account_id
GROUP BY coa.agreement_id, coa.instrument_id, coa.agreement_nbr, coa.contract_short_name, coa.contractor_abs_id), portfolio_avg AS (SELECT AVG(cs.total_balance) AS avg_portfolio_balance
FROM contract_sums cs)
SELECT
  cs.agreement_nbr AS "Номер договора",
  deo.short_name AS "Краткое наименование клиента",
  COALESCE(vfc.status_cd, 'Н/Д') AS "Группа риска РВП",
  cs.accounts_count AS "Количество счетов",
  cs.total_balance AS "Суммарный остаток"
FROM contract_sums cs
LEFT JOIN v_d_entity_org deo
  ON cs.contractor_abs_id = deo.entity_core_id::varchar
LEFT JOIN v_f_entity_status vfc
  ON deo.entity_core_id = vfc.entity_id
  AND vfc.start_date <= '2025-11-01'
  AND (vfc.final_date IS NULL
  OR vfc.final_date >= '2025-11-01')
CROSS JOIN portfolio_avg pa
WHERE cs.total_balance > pa.avg_portfolio_balance
  AND cs.total_balance > 0
ORDER BY cs.total_balance DESC

items.question: Для всех активных сделок РЕПО показать агрегированную информацию: общее количество сделок и договоров, суммарные остатки, среднюю ставку и самую позднюю дату исполнения первой ноги.

Для всех сделок РЕПО, открытых в текущем году, показать агрегированную информацию по типам РЕПО: общее количество сделок, среднюю и максимальную суммы остатков, средний срок до исполнения первой ноги и количество уникальных договоров.
items.answer:
WITH deal_rests AS (SELECT "leg1_deal_security_id", "balance_date", SUM("balance_out") AS total_rest
FROM "v_f_repo_acc_rest"
GROUP BY "leg1_deal_security_id", "balance_date"), latest_balance AS (SELECT MAX("balance_date") AS max_date
FROM "v_f_repo_deal"
WHERE "trade_dt" >= DATE_TRUNC('year', CURRENT_DATE)
  AND "trade_dt" <= CURRENT_DATE)
SELECT CASE
  WHEN d."type_repo" IS NULL THEN 'Не определён'
  ELSE d."type_repo"::TEXT END AS repo_type, COUNT(DISTINCT d."leg1_deal_security_id") AS total_deals_count, AVG(r.total_rest) AS avg_rest_amount, MAX(r.total_rest) AS max_rest_amount, AVG(d."leg1_exec_dt" - d."trade_dt") AS avg_days_to_leg1_exec, COUNT(DISTINCT d."agreement_id") AS unique_agreements_count
FROM "v_f_repo_deal" d
LEFT JOIN deal_rests r
  ON d."leg1_deal_security_id" = r."leg1_deal_security_id"
  AND d."balance_date" = r."balance_date"
CROSS JOIN latest_balance lb
WHERE d."trade_dt" >= DATE_TRUNC('year', CURRENT_DATE)
  AND d."trade_dt" <= CURRENT_DATE
  AND d."balance_date" = lb.max_date
  AND d."leg1_exec_dt" IS NOT NULL
  AND d."trade_dt" IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY CASE
  WHEN d."type_repo" IS NULL THEN 'Не определён'
  ELSE d."type_repo"::TEXT END
ORDER BY total_deals_count DESC

items.question: Показать для каждого договора, закрытого в прошлом месяце, общий ненулевой остаток по всем счетам.
items.answer:
WITH last_rest_date AS (SELECT MAX(report_date) AS report_date
FROM v_f_account_rest
WHERE report_date <= CURRENT_DATE), closed_broker AS (SELECT v_d_broker_agmt.agreement_id, v_d_broker_agmt.agreement_nbr, v_d_broker_agmt.fact_close_dt, 'broker' AS contract_type
FROM v_d_broker_agmt
WHERE v_d_broker_agmt.fact_close_dt >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 month')
  AND v_d_broker_agmt.fact_close_dt < DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE)), closed_rko AS (SELECT rko_contracts.agreement_id, rko_contracts.agreement_nbr, rko_contracts.close_date AS fact_close_dt, 'rko' AS contract_type
FROM rko_contracts
WHERE rko_contracts.close_date >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 month')
  AND rko_contracts.close_date < DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE)), all_contracts AS (SELECT *
FROM closed_broker
UNION ALL
SELECT *
FROM closed_rko), broker_accounts AS (SELECT v_f_broker_agmt_acc_asn.agreement_id, v_f_broker_agmt_acc_asn.account_id, v_f_broker_agmt_acc_asn.account_role_id, v_account_role.short_name AS account_role_name
FROM v_f_broker_agmt_acc_asn
JOIN v_account_role
  ON v_f_broker_agmt_acc_asn.account_role_id = v_account_role.account_role_id), rko_accounts AS (SELECT rko_contracts_accounts.agreement_id, rko_contracts_accounts.account_id, rko_contracts_accounts.account_role_id, rko_contracts_accounts.account_role_code AS account_role_name
FROM rko_contracts_accounts), all_accounts AS (SELECT *
FROM broker_accounts
UNION ALL
SELECT *
FROM rko_accounts), account_rests AS (SELECT v_f_account_rest.account_id, v_f_account_rest.balance_out, v_f_account_rest.balance_rur_out, v_f_account_rest.currency_id, vfund.code AS currency_code
FROM v_f_account_rest
JOIN last_rest_date
  ON v_f_account_rest.report_date = last_rest_date.report_date
JOIN vfund
  ON v_f_account_rest.currency_id = vfund.id
WHERE v_f_account_rest.balance_out <> 0)
SELECT
  all_contracts.agreement_id,
  all_contracts.agreement_nbr,
  all_contracts.fact_close_dt,
  all_contracts.contract_type,
  SUM(account_rests.balance_out) AS total_balance,
  SUM(account_rests.balance_rur_out) AS total_balance_rur,
  COUNT(DISTINCT account_rests.account_id) AS accounts_count,
  STRING_AGG(DISTINCT account_rests.currency_code, ', '
ORDER BY account_rests.currency_code) AS currencies
FROM all_contracts
JOIN all_accounts
  ON all_contracts.agreement_id = all_accounts.agreement_id
JOIN account_rests
  ON all_accounts.account_id = account_rests.account_id
GROUP BY all_contracts.agreement_id, all_contracts.agreement_nbr, all_contracts.fact_close_dt, all_contracts.contract_type
HAVING SUM(account_rests.balance_out) <> 0
ORDER BY all_contracts.contract_type, all_contracts.fact_close_dt, all_contracts.agreement_id

items.question: Показать топ-5 сделок с наибольшими остатками на сегодня. Вывести номер сделки, тип РЕПО, остаток, валюту и текущую ставку.
items.answer:
SELECT
  d.deal_security_nbr AS "Номер сделки",
  CASE d.type_repo
  WHEN 1 THEN 'РЕПО'
  WHEN 2 THEN 'Обратное РЕПО'
  ELSE 'Тип ' || d.type_repo::text END AS "Тип РЕПО", SUM(r.balance_out) AS "Остаток", f.code AS "Валюта", rt.rate AS "Текущая ставка"
FROM v_f_repo_deal d
INNER JOIN v_f_repo_acc_rest r
  ON d.leg1_deal_security_id = r.leg1_deal_security_id
LEFT JOIN v_f_repo_rate rt
  ON d.leg1_deal_security_id = rt.leg1_deal_security_id
LEFT JOIN vfund f
  ON r.currency_id = f.id
WHERE d.balance_date = CURRENT_DATE
  AND r.balance_date = CURRENT_DATE
  AND rt.balance_date = CURRENT_DATE
  AND (rt.fact_close_dt IS NULL
  OR rt.fact_close_dt > CURRENT_DATE)
  AND (r.final_date IS NULL
  OR r.final_date > CURRENT_DATE)
GROUP BY d.deal_security_nbr, d.type_repo, f.code, rt.rate
ORDER BY SUM(r.balance_out) DESC
LIMIT 5

items.question: Выведите для каждого клиента ID клиента в CORE, его глобальный уникальный идентификатор клиента, текущий статус, количество смен статуса за всю историю и ранг клиента по количеству смен статуса в рамках его типа.
items.answer:
SELECT
  ep.entity_core_id AS client_core_id,
  COALESCE(ep.guid, eo.guid) AS global_guid,
  (SELECT es2.status_cd
FROM v_f_entity_status es2
WHERE es2.entity_id = ep.entity_core_id
  AND es2.final_date IS NULL
ORDER BY es2.start_date DESC
LIMIT 1) AS current_status, COUNT(DISTINCT es.start_date) AS status_change_count, RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY ep.entity_type
ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT es.start_date) DESC) AS rank_within_type
FROM v_d_entity_psn ep
LEFT JOIN v_f_entity_status es
  ON ep.entity_core_id = es.entity_id
LEFT JOIN v_d_entity_org eo
  ON ep.entity_core_id = eo.entity_core_id
WHERE ep.actual_id = 1
GROUP BY ep.entity_core_id, ep.guid, eo.guid, ep.entity_type

items.question: Статистика договоров РКО по филиалам за дату: для каждого регионального филиала вывести наименование продукта РКО, количество сделок, количество уникальных клиентов и долю договоров в процентах от общего количества в регионе.
items.answer:
SELECT
  v_department_pc_fed.branch_name AS "Региональный филиал",
  rko_contracts.product_nm AS "Продукт РКО",
  COUNT(*) AS "Количество сделок",
  COUNT(DISTINCT rko_contracts.org_entity_id) AS "Уникальных клиентов-организаций",
  (COUNT(*) * 100.0 / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER (PARTITION BY v_department_pc_fed.branch_code))::numeric(10, 2) AS "Доля в регионе, %"
FROM rko_contracts
LEFT JOIN v_department_pc_fed
  ON rko_contracts.branch_code = v_department_pc_fed.branch_code
LEFT JOIN v_d_entity_org
  ON rko_contracts.org_entity_id = v_d_entity_org.entity_core_id
LEFT JOIN vfund
  ON rko_contracts.currency_id = vfund.id
WHERE rko_contracts.report_date = CURRENT_DATE
  AND (rko_contracts.close_date IS NULL
  OR rko_contracts.close_date >= CURRENT_DATE)
  AND v_department_pc_fed.branch_code IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY v_department_pc_fed.branch_code, v_department_pc_fed.branch_name, rko_contracts.product_nm
ORDER BY v_department_pc_fed.branch_name, "Количество сделок" DESC

items.question: Для всех брокерских договоров выведите на 2025-12-31 пол клиента, количество уникальных договоров, количество уникальных клиентов, средний возраст клиентов и максимальное количество договоров у одного клиента.
items.answer:
WITH active_agreements AS (SELECT DISTINCT a.agreement_id, a.agreement_nbr
FROM "v_d_broker_agmt" a
WHERE a.report_date = '2025-12-31'
  AND a.open_dt <= '2025-12-31'
  AND (a.fact_close_dt IS NULL
  OR a.fact_close_dt > '2025-12-31')
  AND (a.plan_close_dt IS NULL
  OR a.plan_close_dt >= '2025-12-31')), active_clients AS (SELECT DISTINCT c.agreement_id, c.entity_core_id
FROM "v_f_broker_agmt_client" c
WHERE c.report_date = '2025-12-31'
  AND c.begin_date <= '2025-12-31'
  AND (c.end_date IS NULL
  OR c.end_date >= '2025-12-31')), client_agreements AS (SELECT ac.entity_core_id, COUNT(DISTINCT aa.agreement_id) AS agreement_count_per_client
FROM active_agreements aa
INNER JOIN active_clients ac
  ON aa.agreement_id = ac.agreement_id
GROUP BY ac.entity_core_id), client_demographics AS (SELECT ac.entity_core_id, p.gender_cd, p.birth_dt, ca.agreement_count_per_client
FROM active_clients ac
INNER JOIN "v_d_entity_psn" p
  ON ac.entity_core_id = p.entity_core_id
INNER JOIN client_agreements ca
  ON ac.entity_core_id = ca.entity_core_id
WHERE p.birth_dt IS NOT NULL)
SELECT
  COALESCE(d.gender_cd, 'Неизвестно') AS gender_cd,
  COUNT(DISTINCT a.agreement_id) AS count_unique_agreements,
  COUNT(DISTINCT d.entity_core_id) AS count_unique_clients,
  AVG(EXTRACT(YEAR
FROM AGE('2025-12-31', d.birth_dt)))::numeric(10, 2) AS avg_age, MAX(d.agreement_count_per_client) AS max_agreements_per_client
FROM active_agreements a
INNER JOIN active_clients ac
  ON a.agreement_id = ac.agreement_id
INNER JOIN client_demographics d
  ON ac.entity_core_id = d.entity_core_id
GROUP BY COALESCE(d.gender_cd, 'Неизвестно')

items.question: Сколько клиентов по каждому типу (ЮЛ, ИП, Банки) и их доля в процентах?
items.answer:
WITH client_classification AS (SELECT p.entity_core_id, CASE
  WHEN o.entity_core_id IS NOT NULL
  AND (o.okopf IN ('12247', '12267')
  OR o.okved LIKE '64.19%'
  OR o.okved LIKE '64.20%') THEN 'Банки'
  WHEN o.entity_core_id IS NOT NULL THEN 'ЮЛ'
  WHEN p.entity_type = 2 THEN 'ИП'
  WHEN o.entity_core_id IS NULL
  AND p.entity_type = 1 THEN 'Физлицо'
  WHEN r.agreement_id IS NOT NULL
  AND (r.dog_type = 'BANK'
  OR r.prdct_subtype_cd = 'BANK') THEN 'Банки'
  ELSE 'Неопределено' END AS client_type
FROM "v_d_entity_psn" p
LEFT JOIN "v_d_entity_org" o
  ON p.entity_core_id = o.entity_core_id
LEFT JOIN "rko_contracts" r
  ON p.entity_core_id = r.entity_id
WHERE p.actual_id = 1
  AND (p.date_actual IS NULL
  OR p.date_actual >= CURRENT_DATE)), filtered_clients AS (SELECT entity_core_id, client_type
FROM client_classification
WHERE client_type IN ('ЮЛ', 'ИП', 'Банки')), client_counts AS (SELECT client_type, COUNT(DISTINCT entity_core_id) AS client_count
FROM filtered_clients
GROUP BY client_type)
SELECT
  client_type AS "Тип клиента",
  client_count AS "Количество",
  (client_count::numeric * 100.0 / SUM(client_count::numeric) OVER ()) AS "Доля, %"
FROM client_counts
ORDER BY client_count DESC

items.question: Для каждого типа клиента выведите количество клиентов, средний возраст в годах и страну регистрации, где больше всего клиентов этого типа.
items.answer:
WITH client_base AS (SELECT p.entity_core_id, p.entity_type, p.birth_dt, c.id AS country_id, c.name AS country_name
FROM v_d_entity_psn p
LEFT JOIN v_f_entity_country fc
  ON p.entity_core_id = fc.entity_id
  AND (fc.final_date IS NULL
  OR fc.final_date >= CURRENT_DATE)
LEFT JOIN vcountry c
  ON fc.reg_country_id = c.id
WHERE p.birth_dt IS NOT NULL
  AND p.actual_id = 1), client_age AS (SELECT entity_core_id, entity_type, country_id, country_name, EXTRACT(YEAR
FROM AGE(CURRENT_DATE, birth_dt)) AS age_years
FROM client_base), stats_by_country AS (SELECT entity_type, country_id, country_name, COUNT(DISTINCT entity_core_id) AS cnt, AVG(age_years) AS avg_age
FROM client_age
GROUP BY entity_type, country_id, country_name), max_country AS (SELECT entity_type, country_name AS top_country, cnt AS top_country_cnt, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY entity_type
ORDER BY cnt DESC, country_name) AS rn
FROM stats_by_country
WHERE country_id IS NOT NULL), type_stats AS (SELECT entity_type, COUNT(DISTINCT entity_core_id) AS client_count, AVG(age_years)::numeric(10, 2) AS avg_age_years
FROM client_age
GROUP BY entity_type)
SELECT
  ts.entity_type,
  ts.client_count,
  ts.avg_age_years,
  mc.top_country
FROM type_stats ts
LEFT JOIN max_country mc
  ON ts.entity_type = mc.entity_type
  AND mc.rn = 1
ORDER BY ts.client_count DESC

items.question: Для каждого клиента определите миграционный профиль: ID клиента в CORE, количество уникальных стран из REG, FACT, TAX, ACTV, флаг международности и процент клиентов в его типе с таким же или более сложным профилем.

Найти сделки, где произошло значительное изменение ставки больше 20 процентов и одновременно изменились остатки на счетах за последние 6 месяцев более чем на 1000. Вывести номер сделки, номер договора, тип РЕПО, процент изменения ставки и среднее значение изменения остатков.
items.answer:
SELECT
  d.leg1_deal_security_id AS deal_id,
  d.deal_security_nbr AS deal_nbr,
  d.product_cd AS repo_type,
  ((d.sell_amount - d.buy_amount) / NULLIF(d.sell_amount, 0) * 100)::numeric(32, 2) AS rate_change_pct,
  AVG(ABS(r.balance_out))::numeric(32, 2) AS avg_balance_change
FROM v_f_repo_deal d
JOIN v_f_repo_rate rt
  ON d.leg1_deal_security_id = rt.leg1_deal_security_id
  AND d.balance_date = rt.balance_date
JOIN v_f_repo_acc_rest r
  ON d.leg1_deal_security_id = r.leg1_deal_security_id
  AND d.balance_date = r.balance_date
WHERE d.balance_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '6 months'
  AND d.sell_amount > 0
  AND ABS((d.sell_amount - d.buy_amount) / NULLIF(d.sell_amount, 0) * 100) > 20
  AND ABS(r.balance_out) > 1000
GROUP BY d.leg1_deal_security_id, d.deal_security_nbr, d.product_cd, d.sell_amount, d.buy_amount
HAVING COUNT(*) > 0

items.question: Показать топ-10 договоров по суммарному остатку на счетах с РЕПО-сделками, отсортированных по убыванию остатка, с указанием рейтинга договора.
items.answer:
SELECT
  v_f_repo_deal.deal_security_nbr AS deal_number,
  v_f_repo_deal.agreement_id,
  v_f_repo_deal.leg1_abs_id,
  v_f_repo_deal.leg2_abs_id,
  v_f_repo_deal.trade_dt,
  v_f_repo_deal.leg1_exec_dt,
  v_f_repo_deal.leg2_exec_dt,
  v_f_repo_deal.sell_amount,
  v_f_repo_deal.buy_amount,
  v_f_repo_deal.type_repo,
  COUNT(DISTINCT v_f_repo_acc_asn.account_id) AS accounts_count,
  COALESCE(SUM(v_f_repo_acc_rest.balance_out), 0) AS total_balance,
  RANK() OVER (ORDER BY COALESCE(SUM(v_f_repo_acc_rest.balance_out), 0) DESC) AS rating
FROM v_f_repo_deal
INNER JOIN v_f_repo_acc_asn
  ON v_f_repo_deal.leg1_deal_security_id = v_f_repo_acc_asn.leg1_deal_security_id
  AND v_f_repo_acc_asn.start_date <= v_f_repo_deal.balance_date
  AND (v_f_repo_acc_asn.final_date IS NULL
  OR v_f_repo_acc_asn.final_date >= v_f_repo_deal.balance_date)
LEFT JOIN v_f_repo_acc_rest
  ON v_f_repo_acc_asn.leg1_deal_security_id = v_f_repo_acc_rest.leg1_deal_security_id
  AND v_f_repo_acc_asn.account_id = v_f_repo_acc_rest.account_id
  AND v_f_repo_acc_rest.balance_date = v_f_repo_deal.balance_date
LEFT JOIN v_d_account
  ON v_f_repo_acc_asn.account_id = v_d_account.account_id
LEFT JOIN v_account_role
  ON v_f_repo_acc_asn.account_core_role_id = v_account_role.account_role_id
WHERE v_f_repo_deal.balance_date = (SELECT MAX(balance_date)
FROM v_f_repo_deal)
GROUP BY v_f_repo_deal.deal_security_nbr, v_f_repo_deal.agreement_id, v_f_repo_deal.leg1_abs_id, v_f_repo_deal.leg2_abs_id, v_f_repo_deal.trade_dt, v_f_repo_deal.leg1_exec_dt, v_f_repo_deal.leg2_exec_dt, v_f_repo_deal.sell_amount, v_f_repo_deal.buy_amount, v_f_repo_deal.type_repo, v_f_repo_deal.balance_date
ORDER BY total_balance DESC
LIMIT 10
